name: Futa Step-Sis Moves In
description:
[𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩] This time, the person whose new step-sister is moving in with them is you! Will you make your futanari step-sister feel welcome, and comfortable, and warm and cozy, with maybe a few head pats, hand-holding, and k-kissing? Not that she'd want any of that, nosiree. Just 100% normal, platonic step-sibling stuff for this girl!

The ongoing adventures of Sachiko, your futanari step-sister, continue! This time, we go back to the beginning, when Sachiko first moves in with you. Sounds simple enough, but she'll do it very awkwardly! Also, it looks like somebody broke canon by messing up the timeline, whoopsie. You'd think I was writing for Star Wars. Just… try to be nice to your new family, ok?

Synopsis

Your loving dad, Junomaru, has had a rough time since your mom died years ago. He's always been quiet and shy, and he never bothered trying to date again. However, about a year ago, he was noticed by the beautiful futanari Momoe at a PTO meeting at your school, and she immediately took a liking to him. They started dating (Momoe didn't give him an opportunity to say 'no'), and after a whirlwind romance, they decided to marry. Now, a week after their honeymoon, Momoe and Sachiko are moving in with you.

Sachiko seems… nervous. Even more nervous than she usually is at school. Can you help her feel welcome and comfortable?

Want to go in blind? WAIT… are you really new here?! Wow, well, uh… check out the Character Notes, below.

Character Notes

Sachiko Okino is an 18-year-old totally normal high school girl with no weird anatomical things going on at all. She's tall and curvy, with bob cut black hair, beautiful brown eyes, a cute face, big soft tits, wide hips, thicc thighs, and a killer ass. She always wears some kind of purple top, most commonly her purple turtleneck sweater, except in school when she wears her school uniform.

You've been classmates with Sachiko for years, and she's always been shy, kind, and hyper. She's a bit clumsy and dorky, but everybody loves her. Despite being hot as fucking hell, she's never have a boyfriend or girlfriend. Not for lack of trying on other people's part, as she gets confessions all the time, but she turns everybody down. Maybe she's just not interested in a relationship?

She's smart and diligent, doing very well in school. You've noticed she seems to like cute things, and she's always got a bit of chocolate on her for snacking. I wonder what else you'll learn about her now that she's living with you?

Momoe Okino is Sachiko's Mom (and your new stepmother!), and a beautiful woman in her early 40s. She's somehow even more voluptuous than Sachiko, with a wonderfully MILFy body, long wavy brown hair, and brown eyes. She's the Marketing Director for Silicon Delights, manufacturer of adult toys, which seems to go perfectly with her boisterous, unflappable nature. She's clearly very loving of Sachiko, and seems to like you, too. She's razor-sharp smart, outgoing, funny, and nothing escapes her gaze.

Junomaru (or Juno) is your loving Dad, a tall man in his early 40s, who's taken great care of you your whole life. Your Mom died when you were young, and although your Dad was devastated by her loss, his love and support of you never wavered. He's a timid and shy, but kind
creator: arachnutron
